'''Geor-Dan-Thi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tiss'shar]] who served as the [[President of the Tiss'sharl League|President]] of the [[Tiss'sharl League]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], replacing [[Si-Di-Ri]] in the office.

==Biography==
Geor-Dan-Thi made a quick career by [[Assassin/Legends|assassinating]] [[Gender/Legends|his]] opponents, namely [[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]] [[Antha-Kres]], [[Secretary/Legends|Secretary]] [[Lai-O-Sid]] and [[Vice President/Legends|Vice President]] [[Astre-De-Kay]]. Next in line to be [[Death/Legends|killed]] was [[President of the Tiss'sharl League|President]] [[Si-Di-Ri]] himself, an act that would make Geor-Dan-Thi President. Geor-Dan-Thi was surprised to see that Si-Di-Ri resigned from his position, making assassination unnecessary.
